texto: Many of us live like dead people because we live without awareness. We carry our dead bodies with us and circulate throughout the world. We are pulled into the past or we are pulled forward into the future or we are caught by our projects or our despair and anger. We are not truly alive
autor: we are not inhabited by awareness of the miracle of being alive.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a we are not inhabited by awareness of the miracle of being alive.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “Many of us live like dead people because we live without awareness. We carry our dead bodies with…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, thich-nhat-hanh, no-death pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e no-death.
